title: struthiola ovata var. lanceolata
intro: Struthiola ovata var. lanceolata, also known as the lance-leaved struthiola, is a plant species within the genus Struthiola, belonging to the family Thymelaeaceae. It is a shrub found in South Africa, valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Struthiola ovata var. lanceolata is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being.
